Name: Oronos
Relevance: High-power experimental rocketry team competing internationally (e.g., Spaceport America Cup).

Name: PolyOrbite
Relevance: CubeSat development team focused on satellite design, orbital mechanics, and space missions (e.g., Hathôr mission).

Name: Elikos
Relevance: Autonomous drone design team specializing in navigation, guidance, and unmanned aerial systems.

Name: PolyAéro
Relevance: The official aerospace student committee at Polytechnique, coordinating industry networking and academic support for aerospace students.

Name: MIST Lab
Relevance: The Making Innovative Software and Technology Lab research into swarm robotics and autonomous agents for space and lunar exploration.

Name: LARCASE
Relevance: The Laboratory of Applied Research in Active Controls, Avionics and Aero-Servo-Elasticity led by Prof. Ruxandra Botez.

Name: LM2
Relevance: Laboratory of Multiscale Mechanics conducting research on advanced materials, rovers, and additive manufacturing for space environments.

Name: Laboratoire des procédés plasma
Relevance: Research into plasma physics with applications in satellite propulsion, surface treatment, and materials science.

Name: Institute of Aerospace Engineering (IIG)
Relevance: University institute coordinating aerospace education, industry internships, and inter-institutional research projects.

Name: Poly-G
Relevance: General robotics society often participating in space-related robotics challenges (e.g., lunar mining).

Name: SLOWPOKE Laboratory
Relevance: Nuclear research facility; research includes radiation effects on electronics and potential nuclear space power systems.

Name: Pulsar (UdeM/Poly)
Relevance: Shared astronomy club with the Université de Montréal focused on sky observation and astrophysics outreach.

Name: CRIAQ
Relevance: Consortium for Research and Innovation in Aerospace in Quebec; a major hub for collaborative aerospace R&D involving Polytechnique.

Name: CAMAQ Integration Projects
Relevance: Specific capstone projects in partnership with industry leaders like Bombardier and Pratt & Whitney for aerospace training.

Name: LASSUN
Relevance: Laboratory for Space Systems and Sensors focused on control systems and instrumentation for satellite missions.

Name: LAA
Relevance: Laboratoire d'Aéronautique et d'Aérospatial focusing on structural and fluid mechanics for aerospace vehicles.

Name: NSERC-Safran Chair
Relevance: Industrial research chair focused on 3D composites for aerospace engines and propulsion systems.

Name: PolyProject
Relevance: Student initiative that coordinates varied engineering projects, historically including high-altitude balloon and space-adjacent tech.

Name: CIADI
Relevance: The Concordia Institute for Aerospace Design and Innovation, which operates joint training and projects with Polytechnique students.

Name: Drones-Poly
Relevance: Historical drone initiative that predates or is a precursor to modern UAV groups like Elikos.
